# Snorlax / API v1

Base URL: `http://snorlax.example.com/v1`

## Channels

<details>
<summary><h3>GET /channels</h3></summary>

Response Schema:

```json
{
    "code": 200,
    "data": {
        "items": [
            {
                "id": "UCxxxxxxxxxx",
                "handle": "@iiPythonx",
                "name": "iiPython",
                "subscribers": 0,
                "preferred_id": "@iiPythonx"
            }
        ],
        "total": 1
    }
}
```

**This endpoint supports pagination via the `limit` and `page` query parameters.**

</details>

<details>
<summary><h3>GET /channel/{id}</h3></summary>

Response Schema (Success):

```json
{
    "code": 200,
    "data": {
        "id": "UCxxxxxxxxxx",
        "handle": "@iiPythonx",
        "name": "iiPython",
        "subscribers": 0,
        "preferred_id": "@iiPythonx"
    }
}
```

Response Schema (Failure):

```json
{
    "code": 404,
    "data": {
        "message": "The specified channel does not exist."
    }
}
```

</details>

<details>
<summary><h3>DELETE /channel/{id}</h3></summary>

Response Schema (Success):

```json
{
    "code": 200
}
```

Response Schema (Failure):

```json
{
    "code": 404,
    "data": {
        "message": "The specified channel does not exist."
    }
}
```

</details>

## Videos

<details>
<summary><h3>GET /videos</h3></summary>

Response Schema:

```json
{
    "code": 200,
    "data": {
        "items": [
            {
                "id": "xxxxxxxxxx",
                "title": "Example Video",
                "description": "This is an example video.",
                "view_count": 0,
                "like_count": 0,
                "duration_string": "01:10",
                "timestamp": 1700000000,
                "channel_id": "UCxxxxxxxxxx",
                "caption_langs": ["en"],
                "chapters": [
                    {
                        "start_time": 0.0,
                        "end_time": 60.0,
                        "title": "Something"
                    }
                ],
                "channel_name": "iiPython",
                "channel_preferred_id": "@iiPythonx"
            }
        ],
        "total": 1
    }
}
```

**This endpoint supports pagination via the `limit` and `page` query parameters.**

</details>

<details>
<summary><h3>GET /video/{id}</h3></summary>

Response Schema (success):

```json
{
    "code": 200,
    "data": {
        "id": "xxxxxxxxxx",
        "title": "Example Video",
        "description": "This is an example video.",
        "view_count": 0,
        "like_count": 0,
        "duration_string": "01:10",
        "timestamp": 1700000000,
        "channel_id": "UCxxxxxxxxxx",
        "caption_langs": ["en"],
        "chapters": [
            {
                "start_time": 0.0,
                "end_time": 60.0,
                "title": "Something"
            }
        ],
        "channel_name": "iiPython",
        "channel_preferred_id": "@iiPythonx"
    }
}
```

Response Schema (Failure):

```json
{
    "code": 404,
    "data": {
        "message": "The specified video does not exist."
    }
}
```

</details>

<details>
<summary><h3>DELETE /video/{id}</h3></summary>

Response Schema (Failure):

```json
{
    "code": 200
}
```

Response Schema (Failure):

```json
{
    "code": 404,
    "data": {
        "message": "The specified video does not exist."
    }
}
```

</details>

<details>
<summary><h3>GET /search</h3></summary>

Response Schema:

```json
{
    "code": 200,
    "data": {
        "items": [
            {
                "id": "xxxxxxxxxx",
                "title": "Example Video",
                "description": "This is an example video.",
                "view_count": 0,
                "like_count": 0,
                "duration_string": "01:10",
                "timestamp": 1700000000,
                "channel_id": "UCxxxxxxxxxx",
                "caption_langs": ["en"],
                "chapters": [
                    {
                        "start_time": 0.0,
                        "end_time": 60.0,
                        "title": "Something"
                    }
                ],
                "channel_name": "iiPython",
                "channel_preferred_id": "@iiPythonx"
            }
        ],
        "total": 1
    }
}
```

**This endpoint supports pagination via the `limit` and `page` query parameters.**
**This endpoint requires a search query passed via the `query` query parameter.**

</details>

## Management

<details>
<summary><h3>WS /jobs</h3></summary>

Request Schema:

```json
{
    "type": "add-job",
    "url": "https://youtube.com/watch?v=xxxxxxxxxx"
}
```

```json
{
    "type": "cancel-job",
    "id": "xxxxxxxxxx"
}
```

Response Schema:

```jsonc
{
    "xxxxxxxxxx": {
        "progress": 0.0,
        "status": "queued",
        "title": "Example Video",
        "channel": "iiPython",
        "channel_preferred_id": "@iiPythonx",
        "timestamp": 1700000000,
        "speed": 100,  // MiB/s
        "eta": 5       // Seconds
    }
}
```

</details>
